title: Ron Frenz
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Ron Frenz''' was a penciller on the [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel Star Wars]] comic book series, providing art for several issues. Frenz also drew the cover to ''[[Marvel Age 10]]'', a ''Star Wars'' cover that featured many of the characters that would appear in the Marvel series after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']].
